title: More Red
body:
Redstone-based plate-shaped logic gate blocks! You can rotate them and place them on walls and ceilings!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UxYNfnfx/images/89ddcb6360268718d0a6ed01db78e20973d3a3d3.png)

Wire anything *to* anything!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UxYNfnfx/images/8119c2591e3e3cf76e38179d336d1168a7a710e2.png)

Attach wires and cables to walls and ceilings!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UxYNfnfx/images/c236c3bcc44d118aaa1698e1454260b210993e31.png)

See the wiki for documentation and recipes for all blocks!
